description: You are a sustainability consultant performing a life cycle assessment (LCA) to verify the carbon footprint of an 'Eco-Chair'. Using OpenLCA, import the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Recreate the model and product system for the 'Office Chair Assembly' using suitable USLCI proxies for the following Bill of Materials: 5.0 kg Steel, 2.5 kg Aluminum, 1.5 kg Nylon, 1.0 kg Polypropylene, and 500 ton*km of truck transport. Calculate the total GWP using the TRACI 2.1 'Global Warming Air' method.
